name: cobalt
description: Best way to save what you love
compose:
name: slashnode-cobalt
services:
  web:
    image: dennysubke/cobalt:11.5
    container_name: cobalt
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      API_URL: http://${node.exports.host}:9013/
      API_AUTH_REQUIRED: '0'
      DURATION_LIMIT: '86400'
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:9009:9001
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
